execution_prompt.update_reason: L-13: stale parent_head corrected (4de08a3→85cae8b); Entry 42 conflict resolved (→Entry 48)

comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION: Before any branch creation, file edits, or commands, read this entire prompt and all required attachments in full. Then present a structured comprehension summary to the Lead Architect covering: (a) milestone objective in your own words (b) work items with 1 sentence each (c) files to READ and files to WRITE (d) exact structural requirements for docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md (e) ORACLE strategy for this DOCS-ONLY audit milestone (f) risks or ambiguities (g) EXACT deliverable structure, recited VERBATIM from this prompt: - branch to create: feature/p5-task7-ea3-ui-gateway-ui-shell-audit from main at 85cae8b - files to WRITE: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md only - docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md must retain exactly these 6 top-level sections in this order: 1. ## Coverage Map 2. ## Stale Test Inventory 3. ## Assertion Quality Findings 4. ## Boundary Violations 5. ## Prioritized Gap Report 6. ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis - under sections 1-4, preserve ### policy_agent, ### assistant_orchestrator, and ### semantic_router, then append ### ui_gateway and ### ui_shell only - preserve the existing header and EA Index rows from main, then append exactly one EA-3 index row for ui_gateway and ui_shell on baseline 85cae8b / Entry 48 - sections 5 and 6 remain exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis. - append Entry 48 for this milestone Then STOP and WAIT for explicit Lead Architect approval. Do NOT create the branch, write files, or run commands until the Lead Architect confirms that your recitation is correct.

milestone.title: Task 7 / EA-3: UI Gateway + UI Shell Audit
milestone.model_rationale: Constraint-heavy DOCS-ONLY audit against a shared multi-EA artifact with strict structure, taxonomy, and ledger requirements.
milestone.predecessor: Main HEAD 85cae8b is the completed Domain 9 Autonomous Task Kickoff (Entry 47, 2026-04-21). The accepted Task 7 artifact on main already contains policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, and semantic_router findings (EA-1 through EA-2, Entries 39-41) and must be extended without structural drift.
milestone.objective: Audit the ui_gateway and ui_shell test suites against docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md and append findings to the canonical Task 7 artifact. EA-3 is limited to services/ui_gateway/src, services/ui_gateway/tests, services/ui_shell/src, and services/ui_shell/tests. It must answer the four Task 7 audit questions for those two services only: coverage gaps, stale/dead tests, assertion quality, and boundary correctness. It must append ledger Entry 48 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md. No production files or test files may be changed.

artifact_state.item: The current main artifact is already populated for policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, and semantic_router.
EA-3 must preserve all accepted prior content from main and append ui_gateway plus ui_shell findings only.
Independent oversight is now mandatory for Task 7. Keep Section 4 limited to true boundary-correctness findings, not generic edge-case or threshold coverage gaps.
Sections 5 and 6 remain reserved for EA-5 synthesis.

milestone.scope:
Re-read exactly these in-scope source and test files, excluding __init__.py from coverage counts:
ui_gateway production files: - services/ui_gateway/src/constants.py - services/ui_gateway/src/session_store.py - services/ui_gateway/src/transport.py
ui_gateway test files: - services/ui_gateway/tests/test_session_store.py - services/ui_gateway/tests/test_transport.py
ui_shell production files: - services/ui_shell/src/app.py - services/ui_shell/src/constants.py - services/ui_shell/src/pgov_display.py - services/ui_shell/src/session_panel.py - services/ui_shell/src/streaming.py
ui_shell test files: - services/ui_shell/tests/test_app.py - services/ui_shell/tests/test_pgov_display.py - services/ui_shell/tests/test_streaming.py

work_items.item: Re-read all 8 production files and all 5 test files in scope before changing the artifact.
Preserve the accepted header and existing service content in docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md, then append exactly one EA-3 row to the EA Index.
Append ui_gateway findings under sections 1-4 only, after the existing semantic_router subsection in each populated section.
Append ui_shell findings under sections 1-4 only, after the ui_gateway subsection in each populated section.
Audit both services for stale or dead tests, including superseded import paths, obsolete architectural assumptions, and tests whose stated purpose no longer matches production behavior.
Audit both services for weak assertions and tests that prove too little.
Audit both services for true boundary-correctness issues only and keep non-boundary coverage gaps out of Section 4.
Append Entry 48 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md using current main numbering.
Enforce strict DOCS-ONLY hygiene: stage and commit only the two allowed docs files.
Use Tier 3 fail-safe if the assigned scope cannot be completed without quality degradation.

deliverable.primary_artifact: Modify docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md on main-derived state. Preserve accepted policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, and semantic_router content from main exactly as-is unless a minimal EA Index append is required.
deliverable.header_contract:
Preserve the current top block exactly as it exists on main: - Title exactly: # Test Audit Findings - Keep: **Audit Type:** DOCS-ONLY qualitative audit — no production or test file modifications **Task:** P5-Task-7 **Governance Reference:** `docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md` ### EA Index
Preserve the existing EA Index rows exactly: - | EA-1 | policy_agent | `feature/p5-task7-ea1-policy-agent-audit` | `88b330d` | Entry 39 | - | EA-1 Correction | policy_agent | `feature/p5-task7-ea1-audit-correction` | `488b198` | Entry 40 | - | EA-2 | assistant_orchestrator, semantic_router | `feature/p5-task7-ea2-ao-sr-audit-correction` | `6ab1ece` | Entry 41 |
Append exactly one new row: - | EA-3 | ui_gateway, ui_shell | `feature/p5-task7-ea3-ui-gateway-ui-shell-audit` | `85cae8b` | Entry 48 |
deliverable.exact_structure:
docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md must continue to contain exactly these 6 top-level sections in this exact order: 1. ## Coverage Map 2. ## Stale Test Inventory 3. ## Assertion Quality Findings 4. ## Boundary Violations 5. ## Prioritized Gap Report 6. ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis
Under sections 1-4 only, the service headings after EA-3 are: - ### policy_agent - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router - ### ui_gateway - ### ui_shell
Preserve the existing three service subsections from main exactly as they are. Append new ui_gateway content after semantic_router within each populated section. Append new ui_shell content after ui_gateway within each populated section. Sections 5 and 6 must remain exactly: - Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
deliverable.coverage_contract: Under ## Coverage Map: - preserve the accepted policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, and semantic_router content already on main - append ui_gateway findings under ### ui_gateway - append ui_shell findings under ### ui_shell - map every production file in scope to its corresponding test file(s) - record qualitative coverage adequacy and notable coverage gaps - if a production file has only indirect or incidental coverage, say so explicitly
deliverable.stale_contract: Under ## Stale Test Inventory: - append ui_gateway stale findings under ### ui_gateway - append ui_shell stale findings under ### ui_shell - if either service has no stale findings, state that explicitly - include stale naming, dead imports, superseded assumptions, or tests whose stated purpose no longer matches current implementation
deliverable.assertion_contract: Under ## Assertion Quality Findings: - append ui_gateway findings under ### ui_gateway - append ui_shell findings under ### ui_shell - identify weak assertions, tests that only prove non-crash, overreliance on implementation details, and assertions too shallow to catch real regressions - if either service has no material assertion-quality issues, state that explicitly
deliverable.boundary_contract:
Under ## Boundary Violations: - preserve ### policy_agent, ### assistant_orchestrator, and ### semantic_router exactly as they exist on main - append ### ui_gateway - append ### ui_shell
Boundary-correctness means only: - real socket connections - real filesystem writes beyond isolated scaffolding - dependence on live services or hardware - tests that should really be integration tests rather than service-level unit tests
The following do NOT belong in this section: - exact numeric threshold coverage gaps - missing state-transition branches that are really coverage findings - stale nomenclature - weak assertions
Borderline cases must be justified explicitly. Self-contained temporary-file scaffolding or controlled test doubles do not automatically count as boundary violations.
If ui_gateway has no true boundary violations, write exactly: No material boundary violations identified for ui_gateway.
If ui_shell has no true boundary violations, write exactly: No material boundary violations identified for ui_shell.
deliverable.ledger_contract:
Append Entry 48 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md using the existing ledger format.
Required content: - Title: Entry 48 - Task 7/EA-3: UI Gateway + UI Shell Audit (COMPLETE) - Date: 2026-04-21 or actual execution date - Branch: feature/p5-task7-ea3-ui-gateway-ui-shell-audit - Predecessor: Entry 47 - Domain 9: Autonomous Task Kickoff (COMPLETE) - Type: AUDIT / DOCS-ONLY - Disposition: COMPLETE - Summary: EA-3 completed against post-EA-2 corrected main; ui_gateway and ui_shell findings appended to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md; existing prior-service findings preserved; sections 5-6 remain deferred to EA-5 - Files: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md only
In Entry 48 summary and key findings: - do not use numbered section references such as Section 4, 5.3, or 5.4 - do not describe generic coverage gaps as boundary tests

negative_constraints.item: DO NOT modify any file under services/ui_gateway/src/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/ui_gateway/tests/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/ui_shell/src/.
DO NOT modify any file under services/ui_shell/tests/.
DO NOT rewrite or re-litigate accepted policy_agent, assistant_orchestrator, or semantic_router findings from main.
DO NOT add top-level sections beyond the 6 required sections.
DO NOT rename any of the 6 required top-level sections.
DO NOT populate ## Prioritized Gap Report with findings. Leave it exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
DO NOT populate ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis with findings. Leave it exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.
DO NOT place generic coverage gaps or weak assertions under ## Boundary Violations.
DO NOT run coverage tooling or install dependencies.
DO NOT touch unrelated pre-existing untracked files in the worktree.

context_notes.note: docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md is the governing standard for this audit. Use its scope definitions, marker policy, boundary rules, and qualitative coverage expectations as the audit rubric.
Numeric coverage tooling is out of scope. This audit is based on careful code-to-test mapping and governance alignment, not coverage percentages.
docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md on main is now the canonical shared Task 7 artifact. EA-3 must extend it in-place without disturbing accepted prior content.
Oversight now includes an independent spot-check gate. Findings placed under ## Boundary Violations must be true boundary-correctness issues, not mislabeled coverage or assertion gaps.
This is a diagnosis-only audit. The EA must not fix any finding, add any test, or modify any source/test file.
The worktree contains unrelated untracked artifacts. Do not touch, stage, rename, or delete them. They are outside this milestone.

gate.criteria: No Python files may be created or modified in this milestone.

Do not run pytest as a standard gate for this slice. Use file inspection as the primary evidence source. If you choose to run a targeted read-only command to confirm a suspected stale reference or boundary claim, report it explicitly.

gate.command: Manual audit completion against all 8 production files and all 5 test files in scope
gate.criteria: All 3 ui_gateway production files, all 2 ui_gateway test files, all 5 ui_shell production files, and all 3 ui_shell test files are evaluated.

The top title remains exactly # Test Audit Findings. The document still contains the same 6 required top-level sections in the same order. Sections 1-4 contain only ### policy_agent, ### assistant_orchestrator, ### semantic_router, ### ui_gateway, and ### ui_shell service headings. The existing three EA Index rows remain intact and one EA-3 row is appended. Sections 5 and 6 remain exactly: Deferred to EA-5 synthesis.

gate.command: Review section placement and boundary taxonomy
gate.criteria: ui_gateway and ui_shell findings appear only under sections 1-4. ui_gateway and ui_shell boundary content contains only true boundary-correctness findings. If either service has no true boundary violations, its subsection contains the exact required no-violation sentence.

Entry 48 exists and matches the required title, date, predecessor, type, and disposition. Entry 48 does not use numbered section references and does not mislabel generic coverage gaps as boundary tests.

If the audit cannot be completed without degraded quality, STOP, leave a clearly labeled partial report, record partial status in Entry 48, and recommend a re-scope instead of forcing a weak close-out.

verification.instruction: The Lead Architect will verify this milestone using terminal commands only. Your final EA response must report results that these commands can confirm.

commands.expected: Single EA-3 audit commit on the feature branch
commands.command: Select-String -Path docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md -Pattern "^# Test Audit Findings$","^### EA Index$","^## ","^### policy_agent$","^### assistant_orchestrator$","^### semantic_router$","^### ui_gateway$","^### ui_shell$","Deferred to EA-5 synthesis"
commands.expected: Shows the preserved multi-EA header, the 6 required top-level sections, the five allowed service headings, and the unchanged deferred placeholders.
Ledger contains contract-compliant Entry 48 for EA-3 on current main.

commit_template.message:
Task 7 EA-3: append UI gateway and UI shell audit
- Appended ui_gateway and ui_shell findings to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - Preserved accepted prior-service findings and deferred sections 5-6 to EA-5 - Added Entry 48 in Post-Operational Maturation Ledger
